title: Old log lay on river bank near Market Drayton for four years before being revealed as an ancient treasure 100 years ago
description: At a casual glance, it looks like an oddly-shaped piece of wood. But this was no random log pulled from the River Tern near Market Drayton. It was a rare relic from prehistoric days which was given the name the Mucklestone Canoe.

title: 'Enchanted' Cornish village with lush gardens and ancient church hidden away
description: his 13th-century church features stunning tropical gardens on the banks of a tidal creek

title: Freekeh: All about this nutritious ancient grain
description: Freekeh, an ancient grain, is making waves for its nutritional benefits and unique flavor.

title: Lukas prizes honor books on homelessness, the US Census and ancient India
